commands.review_summary:
The PR changes Control UI chat-session creation to omit fallback or non-persisted visible session keys from `parentSessionKey` when starting a new dashboard chat.

PR surface: Source +41, Tests +195. Total +236 across 5 files.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection shows current main sends the visible session key as `parentSessionKey` except for `unknown`, while the gateway rejects supplied parents without `sessionId`; I did not rerun the browser flow in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] The remaining action is maintainer acceptance of the session-lineage semantics and normal current-head merge review, not an automated code repair.
